title: SkillIOContract
description: Defines the input/output contract for a skill. Each skill's SKILL.md references this schema.

skill.description: Skill identifier. Must match the directory name under .gemini/skills/ or .claude/skills/.

version.description: Semantic version of the skill contract. Increment minor on non-breaking changes, major on breaking.

description.description: One-sentence description of what the skill does.

required.description: Field names that must be present in every invocation.

optional.description: Field names that may be omitted; skill must handle their absence.

schema.description: Field definitions: key=field name, value=type descriptor or JSON Schema fragment.

constraints.description: Input-level validation rules beyond type checking.

format.description: Primary format of the skill's output payload.

schema.description: Field definitions for the output object. Must be consistent with report-schema output field.

nullable.description: If true, skill may return null output on valid no-op execution.

rules.description: Skill-specific behavioral constraints. Supplement global.md and safety.md rules.

examples.description: Optional worked examples for LLM context and testing.
